description: A darkened reproduction of a painting depicting the signing of the U.S. Constitution, with a central standing figure and a group of seated and standing colonial-era men, and an American flag and drum at upper right. Small italic text at the top reads 'Protectors of the Homeland', and large white text across the lower portion reads 'Americans Are DEFENDERS OF FREEDOM'.
notable_text: Protectors of the Homeland; Americans Are DEFENDERS OF FREEDOM
